queries.name: search
queries.description: Perform a search across resources, returning a maximum of 1,000 results.

args.name: after
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

args.name: before
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

args.name: first
args.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

args.name: last
args.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

args.name: query
args.description: The search string to look for. GitHub search syntax is supported. For more information, see "Searching on GitHub," "Understanding the search syntax," and "Sorting search results.".

args.name: type
args.description: The types of search items to search within.

objects.name: SearchResultItemConnection
objects.description: A list of results that matched against a search query. Regardless of the number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types, potentially split across many pages.

fields.name: codeCount
fields.description: The total number of pieces of code that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: discussionCount
fields.description: The total number of discussions that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: issueCount
fields.description: The total number of issues that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: issueSearchType
fields.description: The type of search that was performed for issues (lexical, semantic, or hybrid).

fields.name: lexicalFallbackReason
fields.description: When a semantic or hybrid search falls back to lexical, the reasons why the fallback occurred.

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: A list of nodes.

fields.name: pageInfo
fields.description: Information to aid in pagination.

fields.name: repositoryCount
fields.description: The total number of repositories that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: userCount
fields.description: The total number of users that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: wikiCount
fields.description: The total number of wiki pages that matched the search query. Regardless of the total number of matches, a maximum of 1,000 results will be available across all types.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

fields.name: textMatches
fields.description: Text matches on the result found.

objects.name: TextMatch
objects.description: A text match within a search result.

fields.name: fragment
fields.description: The specific text fragment within the property matched on.

fields.name: highlights
fields.description: Highlights within the matched fragment.

fields.name: property
fields.description: The property matched on.

objects.name: TextMatchHighlight
objects.description: Represents a single highlight in a search result match.

fields.name: beginIndice
fields.description: The indice in the fragment where the matched text begins.

fields.name: endIndice
fields.description: The indice in the fragment where the matched text ends.

fields.name: text
fields.description: The text matched.

enums.name: LexicalFallbackReason
enums.description: Reason why a semantic or hybrid issue search fell back to lexical search.

values.name: NO_ACCESSIBLE_REPOS
values.description: Scoped query resolved to zero accessible repositories.

values.name: NO_TEXT_TERMS
values.description: Query has only qualifiers and no free text terms.

values.name: ONLY_NON_SEMANTIC_FIELDS_REQUESTED
values.description: Query uses an in: qualifier targeting non-semantic fields.

values.name: QUOTED_TEXT
values.description: Query contains quoted text requiring exact matches.

enums.name: SearchType
enums.description: Represents the individual results of a search.

values.name: ISSUE_HYBRID
values.description: Returns results matching issues using hybrid (lexical + semantic) search.

values.name: ISSUE_SEMANTIC
values.description: Returns results matching issues using semantic search.

values.name: USER
values.description: Returns results matching users and organizations on GitHub.
